hooks.description: Detect iOS project and cache metadata for context-aware hooks

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*(-f|--force).*(main|master)'; then echo '🚫 Dangerous: force push to main/master rewrites shared history. Use --force-with-lease on a feature branch or push to a new branch.' && exit 2; fi; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'xcrun\s+simctl\s+erase\s+all'; then echo '⚠️  xcrun simctl erase all wipes ALL simulator state. Prefer erase <device-id> for a single device.' && exit 1; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Block dangerous Bash operations (force push to main, simctl erase all)

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'xcodebuild\s+.*archive'; then SCRIPT="$HOME/.claude/scripts/ios-from-web-guide/validate_pre_archive.sh"; if [ -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then bash "$SCRIPT"; exit $?; fi; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Pre-archive validator — runs validate_pre_archive.sh before xcodebuild archive

hooks.command: EXT="${CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH##*.}"; CACHE="$(pwd)/.ios-from-web-guide-project.json"; if [ "$EXT" = "swift" ] || [ "$EXT" = "plist" ] || [ "$(basename "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH")" = "project.yml" ]; then if [ -f "$CACHE" ]; then IS_IOS=$(grep -o '"is_ios_project":\s*[a-z]*' "$CACHE" | grep -o '[a-z]*$'); [ "$IS_IOS" = "false" ] && exit 0; fi; echo '💡 Reminder: Did you invoke the relevant ios-from-web-guide skill before writing this file? If not, invoke it now and verify your code follows the rules.'; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Remind about skill invocation for iOS files (context-aware)
